html:
Exclusive to:

“Calls forth a Portable Den.”

-

The Burrowing Horn is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Trading Hutch Filter which is only accessible while standing next to a Benevolent Rabbit King, and requires 4 Carrots and 1 Cut Reeds to craft.

The player can play the Burrowing Horn to summon a Portable Den within 2 tiles, or tend the Farm Plants with 3 tiles radius.

Portable Den

“A storage for your items and other trinkets accessible from Portable Dens.”

-

The Portable Den is a 12-slot storage that can be summoned by the Burrowing Horn. Multiple Portable Dens can be summoned at the same time. Similar to the Shadow Dimension, the items stored in the Portable Den can be accessed from another Portable Den. Any player can play the Burrowing Horn any time to call the Portable Den to access the items inside.

Similar to the Shadow Dimension, the irreplaceable items like the Eye Bone cannot be put inside and there is one storage space per shard: one for the Surface, and one for the Caves.

The Portable Den will stay for 2.5 min and will pause its countdown timer when open.

Trivia

  • The Burrowing Horn and Portable Dens were introduced in the Depths of Duplicity update.

Gallery

  • Portable Den Inventory.

Burrowing Horn
"Call on the rabbits to keep your stuff, anytime, any hare."

3 uses (Playing)
Does not stack

Miscellaneous
"rabbitkinghorn"
“The rabbits dig music.”
–Wilson
“Rabbit music?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is jazz man.”
–Wolfgang
“I guess it plays a type of burial song.”
–Wendy
“I HATE THE SOUND IT MAKES”
–WX-78
“It plays a melody meant for rabbit ears.”
–Wickerbottom
“A horn, eh? I prefer woodwinds.”
–Woodie
“I doubt its reliability.”
–Maxwell
“The rabbit had best heed my call.”
–Wigfrid
“What kind of music do rabbits like?”
–Webber
“Do rabbits have a taste for music?”
–Warly
“Play Squee Hopper song?”
–Wormwood
“It must play a thumpin' tune.”
–Winona
“It plays a tunneling tune.”
–Wortox
“Me blow rabbit horn horn.”
–Wurt
“I can't carrot a tune! Heh. Nice, Walter.”
–Walter
“It plays a familiar tune.”
–Wanda
“Calls forth a Portable Den.”
-
The Burrowing Horn is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Trading Hutch Filter which is only accessible while standing next to a Benevolent Rabbit King, and requires 4 Carrots and 1 Cut Reeds to craft.
The player can play the Burrowing Horn to summon a Portable Den within 2 tiles, or tend the Farm Plants with 3 tiles radius.
Portable Den[edit | edit source]
Portable Den
Object Info
Perk
Store 12 items.
2.5 min.
Miscellaneous
"rabbitkinghorn_chest"
“I'll use it now and den.”
–Wilson
“Will the rabbits chew my things?”
–Willow
“Rabbit take care of Wolfgang things!”
–Wolfgang
“It's like a grave for my things.”
–Wendy
“NEVER TRUST A RABBIT”
–WX-78
“The rabbits will keep my things safe.”
–Wickerbottom
“Guess you can never have too much storage.”
–Woodie
“You think I'd trust their ilk to hold my things?”
–Maxwell
“The rabbits pledge tö safeguard my löot within their lair.”
–Wigfrid
“We can hide things with the rabbits!”
–Webber
“A cellar!”
–Warly
“Thanks Squee Hopper!”
–Wormwood
“Mighty kind of them rabbits.”
–Winona
“Subterranean storage service”
–Wortox
“Thanks rabbit!”
–Wurt
“Woby, now you don't have to carry everything!”
–Walter
“I hope I don't forget what I put in there.”
–Wanda
“A storage for your items and other trinkets accessible from Portable Dens.”
-
The Portable Den is a 12-slot storage that can be summoned by the Burrowing Horn. Multiple Portable Dens can be summoned at the same time. Similar to the Shadow Dimension, the items stored in the Portable Den can be accessed from another Portable Den. Any player can play the Burrowing Horn any time to call the Portable Den to access the items inside.
Similar to the Shadow Dimension, the irreplaceable items like the Eye Bone cannot be put inside and there is one storage space per shard: one for the Surface, and one for the Caves.
The Portable Den will stay for 2.5 min and will pause its countdown timer when open.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sừng Đào Hang là một vật phẩm chế tạo độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Hutch giao dịch, chỉ có thể truy cập được khi đứng cạnh Vua thỏ nhân từ và cần 4 Cà rốt và 1 Sậy cắt để chế tạo.

{{Scrapbook Info|Calls forth a Portable Den.}}
The '''Burrowing Horn''' is a craftable item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is found in the [[Trading Hutch Filter]] which is only accessible while standing next to a [[Benevolent Rabbit King]], and requires 4 [[Carrot]]s and 1 [[Cut Reeds]] to craft.

The player can play the Burrowing Horn to summon a [[#Portable Den|Portable Den]] within 2 tiles, or tend the [[Farm Plant]]s with 3 tiles radius.

The '''Portable Den''' is a 12-slot storage that can be summoned by the Burrowing Horn. Multiple Portable Dens can be summoned at the same time. Similar to the [[Shadow Dimension]], the items stored in the Portable Den can be accessed from another Portable Den. Any player can play the Burrowing Horn any time to call the Portable Den to access the items inside. 

Similar to the Shadow Dimension, the irreplaceable items like the [[Eye Bone/DST|Eye Bone]] cannot be put inside and there is one storage space per [[shard]]: one for the Surface, and one for the [[Caves]].

The Portable Den will stay for 2.5 min and will pause its countdown timer when open.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Burrowing Horn and Portable Dens were introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve Together/Version History/2024|Depths of Duplicity]]'' update.
